evals.name: quick-market-snapshot
evals.prompt: 看看今天全球市场怎么样，主要指数、大宗商品、美元指数给我简单列一下
evals.expected_output: Agent should call fetch_market.py (snapshot mode) and summarize indices (S&P/纳指/恒生/上证), commodities (黄金/原油), FX (美元指数) with ▲/▼ changes. Should NOT fabricate numbers.

evals.name: nvda-deep-dive
evals.prompt: Tell me everything you can about NVDA right now — price, valuation, what analysts think, recent news, and whether it's technically overbought.
evals.expected_output: Agent should call fetch_market.py --mode detail --symbols NVDA --include analyst,technicals,news (or include all). Output should mention current price, P/E, target price range, RSI value with interpretation, and at least one recent headline with source.

evals.name: a-share-fund-flow
evals.prompt: 帮我看看贵州茅台最近的主力资金流向，以及股价走势
evals.expected_output: Agent should recognize 贵州茅台 = 600519.SS, call fetch_market.py --mode detail --symbols 600519.SS --include flow. Should report 主力净流入 numbers and recent price action. Should NOT confuse with other stocks.

evals.name: daily-digest-intl
evals.prompt: Compile a brief daily market digest for a global macro investor. Include top-3 movers among major indices, 3-5 international financial headlines, and any relevant commodity/FX action. Markdown format.
evals.expected_output: Agent should call both fetch_market.py (snapshot) and fetch_news.py --sources intl. Output should be markdown with headings (Markets / Headlines / Commodities or FX). Headlines should include source attribution.

evals.name: crypto-and-fear-greed
evals.prompt: How's crypto doing today? BTC, ETH, and where is the fear and greed index sitting?
evals.expected_output: Agent should call fetch_market.py --mode crypto. Output should include BTC + ETH prices with 24h change and Fear & Greed index value + classification (e.g. 'Greed', 'Fear'). Should NOT fabricate numbers if the call fails.
